stemHtml: Which of the following statements regarding tail ice-protection are correct?

options.a: The tail is protected from ice accretion by ram air.
options.b: It uses heat from hydraulic fluid running through the leading-edge pipelines.
options.c: Tail ice-protection is mandatory on any aircraft with wing ice-protection and uses bleed air.
options.d: Some aeroplanes don't have tail ice-protection systems.
